{
  "claims": [
    "Yolo County will dramatically expand meal preparation from 350 to at least 1,250 meals every weekday for food-insecure aging adults.",
    "The kitchen capacity expansion budget for MOW Yolo’s Operation Accelerate is just under $1.4 million.",
    "The 'Operation Accelerate' initiative is expected to double the number of aging adults served to 1,300.",
    "Recovery Café is part of a nationwide network providing a safe, drug and alcohol-free space to support community members suffering from trauma, homelessness, addiction, and mental health challenges.",
    "The Recovery Café aims to improve outcomes for individuals through a peer-driven accountability model.",

    "The current water tender used by the Clarksburg Fire Protection District is 37 years old and relies on home-built components.",
    "Updated water tender equipment is necessary for effective wildfire response and to honor automatic aid agreements with neighboring counties."
